summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ghost-driver dashboard with updated config modules, community features, and admin suggestions functionality. All 7 modules properly implemented with color pickers. Fine Tuning section successfully removed. Suggestion system fully functional.
passed_tests: All 7 config modules present and functional (ESP, RCS, Triggerbot, Radar, Grenade Prediction, Bomb Timer, Spectator List)
ESP Sound has separate color picker when expanded
All new modules have color pickers when expanded
Fine Tuning section removed from Config page
Community page shows only Discord and Leaderboard features
Suggestion form submits successfully and clears after submission
Admin panel Suggestions tab displays user suggestions
Admin can mark suggestions as reviewed
All admin tabs functional (Users, Requests, Keys, Suggestions)
Backend API supports all modules with color configurations
